title: Warm up
content: The slide depicts three different city scenes, each highlighting a distinct feature or activity associated with the city. Beijing is shown with a busy road, Chongqing with a mountainous cityscape, and Hangzhou with a focus on technology.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This introductory slide features imagery of taxis and iconic locations across different Chinese cities. It sets the stage for exploring changes and developments within China.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines a process for investigating cities through local features, development strategies, and their outcomes. It hints at exploring the positive impacts of these strategies.
key_claims: Focus on development strategies and outcomes

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches cities to specific development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: This slide presents development strategies through the metaphor of taxi drivers' perspectives. It emphasizes unique strategies in China, using local characteristics to foster city growth.
